description: You are a Technical SEO auditing a news publisher's AMP implementation. Configure Screaming Frog SEO Spider to crawl and validate Accelerated Mobile Pages (AMP) for 'https://crawler-test.com/'. Export the AMP audit data to a CSV file in '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' with a filename containing 'amp'. Write a report to '~/Documents/SEO/reports/amp_audit_report.txt' listing at least two specific AMP errors found and the total count of AMP pages identified.
